input.document_content:
COMPLIANCE CHECKLIST
1. Prop 65 warning required for wood AND plastic products sold in US
2. CPSIA lead test required for children's items
3. FCC Part 15 label for electronic devices

CHECKLIST
1. Country of origin label required for all items NOT made in USA

CHECKLIST
1. (Wood OR Plastic) AND weight > 5lbs → fragile symbol required
2. Electronic AND (US OR EU) → FCC/CE marking
